title: skills.sh.json
description: Structural contract for the generated skills.sh.json marketplace/index file. Mirrors https://www.skills.sh/docs/customize.

$schema.description: URI of the upstream skills.sh schema.

notGrouped.description: Placement for skills not assigned to any group.

groupings.description: Ordered list of subdomain groups. Empty groups must not be emitted.

description.description: Short description of the subdomain group.

skills.description: Skill names belonging to this group. Each skill name must appear in exactly one group across the whole document.
